base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of big_mario_crouch — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Crouch pose — Mario compresses vertically, bottom 8 px unchanged. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Crouch pose — Mario compresses vertically, bottom 8 px unchanged; only available to Big form; used for ducking under obstacles and entering pipes
